title: Simply OPTIMAL
description: Simply Optimized but more optimal and now maintained for many popular and future versions
body:
![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1388641212977909881?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=%23ffffff&label=EliteCord&labelColor=FF399F&color=FF8132&link=https%3A%2F%2Felte.uk%2Fdiscord)

# What does this pack do?

ButterSmooth LITE is a modpack that makes your game smooth by **QUADRUPLING your FPS** allowing for **smooth** gameplay on even the lowest of hardware. **This modpack even performs better than Simply Optimized and most performance packs** on Modrinth.

# What is the difference between ButterSmooth LITE and ButterSmooth CLIENT?

This is a **skimmed down version of ButterSmooth CLIENT** without any cosmetics or client features, this makes it take up less RAM and **run on worse devices with less RAM** e.g **phones**, **chromebooks** and **tablets** (via pojavlauncher)

![FPS Diagram](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16562e2336d753f518fb0ffb12bf890d02e7295a.png)

# Where do I report bugs?

If you encounter any incompatibilities or bugs whilst using this modpack please report them to my discord that is linked below.   ↓

https://discord.gg/paByquCyF8
